word: G5279 - ὑπομιμνήσκω - hypomimnḗskō - hoop-om-im-nace'-ko - Put in mind

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Put in mind
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to cause one to remember, bring to remembrance, recall to mind
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5259 and G3403; to remind quietly, that is, suggest to the (middle voice, one’s own) memory: - put in mind, remember, bring to (put in) remembrance.
